entities.name: FTP spec
entities.context: A specification that explains how FTP (File Transfer Protocol) operates.

entities.name: NAT traversal
entities.context: A technique used to allow remote hosts to connect back to clients behind a NAT.

entities.name: FTP bounce attacks
entities.context: A type of attack that exploits the FTP protocol to connect to a different server.

relationships.context: Defines a feature related to FTP protocol behavior.
Used in the context of addressing NAT issues in file transfers.
Set to 'false' to prevent a specific type of security risk in FTP.
